verses.text: Josiah' tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gamah kumpi a suahzawh kum li a cin' ciangin Neriah' tapa Baruk in laibu khat sungah keima gen bangbang a gelh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Baruk kiangah
“Baruk aw, Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in nang hong hopih hi
Nangmah in, ‘Gimna thuak ing! Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ka dahna leh ka natna hong behlap hi. Ka tautauna-in ka gim khinzo a, ka tawlnga thei kei hi,’ na ci hi
“ Topa in nang tungah hih bang a gen dingin hong sawl hi: En in, keimah in ka lamsate ka phelkik a, ka phuhsate ka botkhia kik hi. Keimah in leitung buppi tua bangin ka hih ding hi

Tua sung panin nang a pengthei tuam dingin kingaihsun na hi hiam? Tua bangin kingaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh en in, Topa in kong cihin-ah, mi khempeuh tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Ahih hangin nang pen na paina mun khempeuhah kong suaktasak liailiai ding hi, ci hi,” ka ci hi.
